ksa_text: Knowledge of data maturity assessment frameworks, including DCAM, DAMA DMBOK, and CMMI-DMM, and how maturity scores translate to organizational investment priorities.

Obligations of providers of GPAI models with systemic risk

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.411) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Science. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Science roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Governance is not a standard competency expectation for VP Data Science. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Data Science competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.411) and edge-domain placement (Data Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Data Science. All passes support exclusion.
